h4fe146b0g473ag477dg8dddgf0d01e953019: I'm feeling stronger by the minute. I'll be fine.
hd3851985g997dg4d3ega2c3g777186a6a8c9: As soon as my head's clear, I'm heading back to Baldur's Gate to finish this.
h51d85d4cg7a63g48e9g88f3g826e31ac9816: I think the danger's passed, but my head's still spinning. I'll leave when I'm steadier on my feet.
had0f104dg16f6g4846g9b57gc6d4e897d3a9: Home, to Baldur's Gate. This isn't over yet.
hd1aa08e5gac38g4875g9947gb5428a8cc212: Take whatever time you need - the hag's not coming back.
h4b3cb584g50e7g4140ga129g5e28ab51bebb: We need to leave - she might not be dead. I don't even know if she can die.
head99796g2f12g4a27g965cgb460cf082cde: I thought I was lost... could feel my mind slipping away.
he1e7b62cg6faeg4ae8gb405gfa606366a9df: If it weren't for you, I would have ended up like the others. Hollowed out and good as dead.
h5514c6c7g8ee8g4797gaab3g9a6ff52eb6e2: How did you end up here?
h30299783g010fg4f8bg9f09g8049a23f5ca1: Sheer desperation. My mother's mind is gone... she's forgotten herself. I tried medicine, magic, prayer.
h50589fd3g0066g4ee8ga693gdabd45d504da: I'd have begged to Myrkul himself if I thought he'd listen.
h4063d702gf3bfg4fb7gbfb7g8439d5f700e4: Heard about this wise woman out in the back-end of nowhere who could help. I knew it was too good to be true. But I didn't care.
h32078d87g1830g420cga7f5ge556e10595f5: Where will you go now that you're free?
h79b04f17g6ea6g49b3g8661g0ba36f3ea848: That warrants a reward, wouldn't you say?
hc4476e13g498bg4e7bg9122g77296e375da8: The hag took everything except my life. Gratitude's all I can offer for now.
ha3a2f8c1gc356g494cgac8dg38288e8da03d: But she's been luring victims here for years - plenty of other folk will be grateful too. I'll make sure they know your name.
hf3fbb7b3g8f30g4792ga369g289592a9ee37: Don't worry - she can't hurt anyone anymore.
h22e4d3e6g3d6eg4310gb1a4ga7cb2899376b: She wasn't working alone. Fellow back in the city was working as bait - I'm going to find out how much he knows.
h2673ceadgd7e3g4bcag9fbcg13f497b06cc2: It'd be good to see you again if you're out that way. Elfsong Tavern's my local - you'll never pay for a drink there again.
h92e6d42agdf7fg43a3gb5adgdc1c007e9150: Pull yourself together - the hag's dead. I made sure of it.
h9ded4e98g2d9cg432dgb24dged1d0fff07ad: You're right. I don't feel her anymore... she's really gone.
hac3b125ag16e9g47edg949cgddd95b505942: You served her - give me one good reason to let you live.
h3e81389dg00f8g4f1bga345gcde46cda3939: It was the mask. It dug its roots into me... took away my will. I tried to fight it.
h8e965a58g780dg4784g93e0gc20544f8a4b4: You're lucky I didn't cut you down.
h2876e80fgcc7cg4a66g881bg11b6e8493c20: We need to leave . You're not supposed to be here - she'll be furious.
h04bee70egcec2g42c7gb683g3b5c42ef13e6: Auntie only wants what's best for us.
